title: French rights
subtitle: Your author and neighbouring rights in France: what Day 1 estimates, what the societies pay, and the gaps we detect.

chart.heading: Expected vs received by period
chart.sub: Day 1 estimates cross-checked against statements actually received, all societies combined.

sacem.name: Society of authors, composers and music publishers
sacem.desc: Collects and distributes your author rights: streaming, radio, TV, live.

adami.name: Administration of rights for performing artists and musicians
adami.desc: Manages your neighbouring rights as a featured performer.

spedidam.name: Collection society for performers' rights
spedidam.desc: Neighbouring rights for session musicians and backing artists.

spre.name: Society for the collection of equitable remuneration
spre.desc: Equitable remuneration: airplay on radio, TV and public venues.

gapsCallout.title: {count, plural, one {# gap detected} other {# gaps detected}} · {amount} potentially unpaid
gapsCallout.body: Day 1 cross-checks your streams and airplay against received statements. Open the Audit module to review each gap and generate claim letters.

timeline.heading: Upcoming payments
timeline.sub: Distribution calendar: SACEM quarterly, ADAMI and SPEDIDAM every six months.
